Made a couple little QOL updates to the Future Tools News page based on your feedback.

1. The TLDR summaries no longer hide the news below when hovered.
2. There's a TLDR button when viewing on mobile.
3. The header is no longer transparent, which created weird text-overlap https://t.co/fvxmb6W6aP
Goodbye Sora. You were fun for that one week that everyone was talking about you, before getting bored and moving onto other things.

RT @Life_With_ALS: I am The Man Who Speaks With His Mind.

https://t.co/yVsMFT7Znv

OpenAI 关停 Sora，AI 视频明星产品上线半年即告终结

OpenAI 今天宣布关停旗下 AI 视频生成产品 Sora，包括独立 App 和 API 都将下线。Sora 团队在 X 上发帖告别，表示会尽快公布具体时间表和用户作品保存方案。

从去年 9 月高调上线到今天宣布关停，Sora 作为独立产品只存活了大约半年。

One of the really cool things about Sora was the remixing culture.

It made it super easy for new creators to get started - scroll a feed, see something you like, and riff on it (vs. writing your own long prompt).

Hope to see that brought to other AI video products!

From 234M views to $100 million Series B

All the AI labs are exploring the opportunity space for LLMs. Anthropic has always been very focused and OpenAI more prone to testing, and abandoning, concepts (GPT Store, Sora, etc.). Google sort of does everything at once. It is unclear which strategy will be best in the end.

I should charge $99 for each of these.

→ + more dropping & updating regularly

Zero cost. Zero catch. 

Just open and learn 👇

When I started doing AI/ML no one was interested in it. 
Now so many people are doing AI and we have the most incredible community here. 

It makes me so happy! You are are pioneers! We're still early.
Create beautiful things with AI and connect with likeminded supportive and kind creators. You have everything you need to create. https://t.co/HegRtkglTB
